ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the student belongs to */,
  "year_of_selection" INTEGER /* Year the student was selected */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Path to the student's resume file */,
  "job_preferences" TEXT /* JSON string of the student's job preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the branch */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the branch was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who got placed */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that selected the student */,
  "annual_package" REAL /* Annual package offered to the student */,
  "year_of_selection" INTEGER /* Year the student was selected */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role offered to the student */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "selection_process" TEXT /* Details of the selection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement statistic */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "year_of_selection" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students placed */,
  "avg_package" REAL /* Average package offered */,
  "min_package" REAL /* Minimum package offered */,
  "max_package" REAL /* Maximum package offered */,
  "median_package" REAL /* Median package offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_statistics_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_statistics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branch_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch statistic */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "year_of_selection" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students placed */,
  "avg_package" REAL /* Average package offered */,
  "min_package" REAL /* Minimum package offered */,
  "max_package" REAL /* Maximum package offered */,
  "median_package" REAL /* Median package offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branch_statistics_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company statistic */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "year_of_selection" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students placed */,
  "avg_package" REAL /* Average package offered */,
  "min_package" REAL /* Minimum package offered */,
  "max_package" REAL /* Maximum package offered */,
  "median_package" REAL /* Median package offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_statistics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students requested */,
  "req_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role requested */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_requests_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_requests_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "annual_package" REAL /* Annual package offered */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role offered */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "offer_details" TEXT /* JSON string of additional offer details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_offers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_offers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offer */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES placement_offers ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the placement */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_reports_placement_id FOREIGN KEY ("placement_id") REFERENCES placements ("placement_id")
)
